feed.title: Al3xx
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: LinkVortex - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: HackTheBox - LinkVortex Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx 1. Reconnaissance Port Scanning sudo nmap -sC -sV 10.129.231.194 PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.9p1 Ubuntu 3ubuntu0.10 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) 80/tcp open http Apache httpd |_http-title: Did not follow redirect to http://linkvortex.htb/ |_http-server-header: Apache Virtual Hos...

entry.title: Titanic - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx Reconnaissance Port Scan sudo nmap -sC -sV 10.129.231.221 PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.9p1 Ubuntu 3ubuntu0.10 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) | ssh-hostkey: | 256 73:03:9c:76:eb:04:f1:fe:c9:e9:80:44:9c:7f:13:46 (ECDSA) |_ 256 d5:bd:1d:5e:9a:86:1c:eb:88:63:4d:5f:88:4b:7e:04 (ED25519) 80/tcp open http Apache httpd ...

entry.title: Infection - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx Summary Infection is an Easy Linux machine running a Django-based pharmacy web application called MediCare Plus. The machine demonstrates exploitation of CVE-2025-64459, a critical SQL injection vulnerability in Django’s Q object that allows attackers to manipulate ORM query logic by injecting internal parameters (_connector, _negated) through user-c...

entry.title: Gavel - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: Difficulty: Medium OS: Linux Author: al3xx Table of Contents Overview Reconnaissance Initial Access Git Repository Exposure SQL Injection in PDO Prepared Statements Exploiting runkit_function_add() User Flag Privilege Escalation Understanding the Architecture Two-Stage PHP Sandbox Escape Root Flag Key Takeaways Overv...

entry.title: Expressway - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx Table of Contents Overview Executive Summary Reconnaissance TCP Port Scan UDP Port Scan IKE Enumeration PSK Hash Extraction & Cracking Extracting the Hash Cracking with psk-crack Initial Access Privilege Escalation Sudo Version Check Exploitation Conclusio...
